title: Binary financial referendum-style decision over 7 polling rounds

events.description: GameStop announced an agreement with activist investor PRO_LEADER_1 and his firm, RC Ventures, to add him and two other e-commerce specialists to the board of directors
Following the board announcement, GameStop stock experienced a significant surge, reaching an intraday high
Citron Research publicly criticized PRO_SUPPORTER_1 AGAINST_LEADER_2 on Twitter, labeling them 'suckers' and predicting a sharp decline in the stock price
Trading platforms, most notably Robinhood, restricted the purchase of GameStop shares, sparking widespread public outrage and accusations of market manipulation

The U.S. House Committee on AGAINST_LEADER_1 Services held a hearing to investigate the GameStop short squeeze, bringing the conflict between PRO_SUPPORTER_1 AGAINST_LEADER_2 and AGAINST_LEADER_2 AGAINST_LEADER_2 into the federal spotlight
